{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ruler constructs
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The course contains earth-aspect [[Ruler constructs]] that can rebuild stone pillars.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ruler constructs]] automatically intercept objects like trees thrown at [[Moongrave]]'s walls.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
